text: A baked sweet potato with a dollop of Greek yogurt instead of butter.
_comment: HARD MULTI-QUERY + DISTRACTOR: Three items. 'sweet potato (baked)' → variant 'baked sweet potato' is exact USDA — without pooling, raw sweet potato ranks higher than the baked entry. 'Greek yogurt (unspecified)' → category hint dairy & eggs prevents landing on frozen yogurt desserts. DISTRACTOR: 'butter (unspecified)' is mentioned as a contrast ('instead of butter') — tests whether Step 1 LLM correctly excludes it from the item list, since the user did NOT eat butter.
